summary: Cyprus's posture is represented by the Digital Security Authority, the national agency under the Commissioner of Communications, which has engaged with quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography through the ENISA Telecom and Digital Infrastructure Security Forum alongside 5G and Internet of Things security. No national guidance, migration timeline or standards selection has been published.
govActors: DSA | Cyprus Digital Security Authority, independent governmental agency under the Commissioner of Communications, engages with post-quantum cryptography through the ENISA telecom forum

EU-aligned by membership: participates in the NIS Cooperation Group coordinated PQC roadmap (high-risk by 2030, full by 2035); the timeline shown is the EU coordinated roadmap, not a national one.
